news.title:
Latent View reports a steady Q3, focusing on digital AI agents.
The company aims to replace physical workforce with AI solutions.
news.summary:
Latent View reports a steady Q3, focusing on digital AI agents.
The company aims to replace physical workforce with AI solutions.

news.title:
Latent View forecasts steady revenue growth of 19-20% for FY26.
This reflects stable performance and confidence in future operations.
news.summary:
Latent View forecasts steady revenue growth of 19-20% for FY26.
This reflects stable performance and confidence in future operations.

news.title:
Latent View Analytics schedules a virtual one-on-one meeting with Alchemy Capital on Feb 10, 2026.
The meeting will discuss industry and company-specific developments; no price-sensitive info will be shared.
news.summary:
Latent View Analytics schedules a virtual one-on-one meeting with Alchemy Capital on Feb 10, 2026.
The meeting will discuss industry and company-specific developments; no price-sensitive info will be shared.

news.title:
Latent View Analytics reports Q3 FY26 revenue growth: $5.7m in dollars, ₹8cr in rupees.
Financial services grew strongly; payroll costs rose due to new Labor Code impact.
news.summary:
Latent View Analytics reports Q3 FY26 revenue growth: $5.7m in dollars, ₹8cr in rupees.
Financial services grew strongly; payroll costs rose due to new Labor Code impact.

news.title:
Latent View Analytics shares Q3, 9-month investor presentation for Dec 2025.
Earnings call scheduled on Feb 2, 2026, at 7:30 PM IST; details on website.
news.summary:
Latent View Analytics shares Q3, 9-month investor presentation for Dec 2025.
Earnings call scheduled on Feb 2, 2026, at 7:30 PM IST; details on website.

news.title:
Latent View Analytics reported Q3FY26 revenue growth of 22% YoY to ₹2,780M.
Adjusted EBITDA margin was 23%; one-time ₹46M labor code expense impacted margins.
news.summary:
Latent View Analytics reported Q3FY26 revenue growth of 22% YoY to ₹2,780M.
Adjusted EBITDA margin was 23%; one-time ₹46M labor code expense impacted margins.

news.title:
Latent View Analytics schedules Q3FY26 earnings call on Feb 2, 2026, at 7:30 PM IST.
Management team, including CEO Rajan Sethuraman, will discuss financial results and updates.
news.summary:
Latent View Analytics schedules Q3FY26 earnings call on Feb 2, 2026, at 7:30 PM IST.
Management team, including CEO Rajan Sethuraman, will discuss financial results and updates.

news.title:
Latent View Analytics CFO Rajan Bala Venkatesan withdraws resignation, remains in role.
The board highlights the importance of his expertise for the company's future.
news.summary:
Latent View Analytics CFO Rajan Bala Venkatesan withdraws resignation, remains in role.
The board highlights the importance of his expertise for the company's future.

news.title:
ICICI Securities upgrades Latent View Analytics to 'Buy' with growth optimism.
The firm expects 6% QoQ USD revenue growth and 50bps margin expansion in Q3.
news.summary:
ICICI Securities upgrades Latent View Analytics to 'Buy' with growth optimism.
The firm expects 6% QoQ USD revenue growth and 50bps margin expansion in Q3.

news.title: ICICI Sec upgrades Latent View to 'Buy' from 'Add', sets target Rs 560.
news.summary: ICICI Sec upgrades Latent View to 'Buy' from 'Add', sets target Rs 560.

news.title:
Latent View Analytics will hold a board meeting on Feb 1, 2026.
The meeting will approve unaudited financial results for Q3 and 9 months ending Dec 31, 2025.
news.summary:
Latent View Analytics will hold a board meeting on Feb 1, 2026.
The meeting will approve unaudited financial results for Q3 and 9 months ending Dec 31, 2025.

news.title:
Latent View Analytics appoints Mr. Venky Ramesh as Chief Client Officer, effective Nov 17, 2025.
Venky Ramesh brings 20+ years of experience in data, digital, and analytics across Infosys, Cognizant, and Capgemini.
news.summary:
Latent View Analytics appoints Mr. Venky Ramesh as Chief Client Officer, effective Nov 17, 2025.
Venky Ramesh brings 20+ years of experience in data, digital, and analytics across Infosys, Cognizant, and Capgemini.

news.title:
Latent View CFO Rajan Bala Venkatesan resigns effective February 13, 2026.
Resignation aligns with his long-term career goals; detailed disclosure enclosed.
news.summary:
Latent View CFO Rajan Bala Venkatesan resigns effective February 13, 2026.
Resignation aligns with his long-term career goals; detailed disclosure enclosed.

news.title:
Latent View Analytics shared its Q2 FY26 earnings call transcript, highlighting revenue growth of INR 257 crores, a 23.2% YoY increase.
Key growth drivers include Databricks partnerships, AI initiatives, and strong traction in financial services and consumer goods practices.
news.summary:
Latent View Analytics shared its Q2 FY26 earnings call transcript, highlighting revenue growth of INR 257 crores, a 23.2% YoY increase.
Key growth drivers include Databricks partnerships, AI initiatives, and strong traction in financial services and consumer goods practices.

news.title:
Latent View raised FY26 revenue guidance to 19-20% from 18-19% post strong Q2 results.
ICICI Securities maintains 'Add' rating; tech vertical headwinds may limit revenue growth.
news.summary:
Latent View raised FY26 revenue guidance to 19-20% from 18-19% post strong Q2 results.
ICICI Securities maintains 'Add' rating; tech vertical headwinds may limit revenue growth.

news.title:
Latent View projects tax rate stabilization at 25-26% and quarterly operating expenses of INR 30-33 crores.
Company reflects a controlled fiscal strategy, as per its latest concall update.
news.summary:
Latent View projects tax rate stabilization at 25-26% and quarterly operating expenses of INR 30-33 crores.
Company reflects a controlled fiscal strategy, as per its latest concall update.

news.title:
Latent View targets $200-220M revenue by FY28, per concall update.
EBITDA margin guidance revised to 22-23% from 23-24% due to growth investments.
news.summary:
Latent View targets $200-220M revenue by FY28, per concall update.
EBITDA margin guidance revised to 22-23% from 23-24% due to growth investments.

news.title:
Latent View Analytics Ltd released a revised investor presentation for Q2FY26 results, highlighting revenue growth and strategic plans.
Key updates include Databricks partnership, AI integration, regional expansions, and focus on client relationships for future growth.
news.summary:
Latent View Analytics Ltd released a revised investor presentation for Q2FY26 results, highlighting revenue growth and strategic plans.
Key updates include Databricks partnership, AI integration, regional expansions, and focus on client relationships for future growth.

news.title:
Latent View Analytics targets growth via generative AI, Databricks-powered data engineering, and US, Canada, LATAM nearshore centers.
The firm aims to strengthen client mining strategies for profitable expansion.
news.summary:
Latent View Analytics targets growth via generative AI, Databricks-powered data engineering, and US, Canada, LATAM nearshore centers.
The firm aims to strengthen client mining strategies for profitable expansion.

news.title:
Latent View Analytics unveiled Q2 and H1 FY26 financials; earnings call on Oct 27, 2025.
Firm aims strategic growth over 3 years; 1,650 workforce supports global clients.
news.summary:
